folio.label: 118v
folio.l: Ladyes I pray ©ow , that ©e be nat wrotú
I can nat glose , I am a rude man
And sodeynly a noon , this Damyan
Gan pullen vp the smok , and in he thronge
And whan that Pluto , saw this grete wronge
To Ianuarie , he ©af a noon his sigút
That he tha~ne , rigút wel , se mygút
And whan æ he , had caugút his sigút a geyn
Ne was there neuäe man , of thyngö so feyn
But oon his wyf , his thougút was euäe moo
Vp oon the tree , he cast hise eyen two
And saw that Damyan , hys wyf had dressed
In swicú manäe , it may nougút ben expressed
But if I wold speke , vncurteislye
And vp he ©af a rooryngö , and a crye
As dotú the Moder , whan the child shal deye
Out , help , allas , harrow , he gan to crye
O stronge lady , store , what dost thow
And she answered , sire , what eyletú ©ow
Haue pacience and resou~ , in ©oure mynde
I haue ©ow holpe , of bothe ©oure eyen blynde
Vp perile of my soule , I shal nat lyen
As me was taugút , to helen w ©oure eyen
Was no thyngö betir , for to make ©ow se
Than strogle witú a man , vp oon a tree
God wot I dide it , in ful good entent
Strogle q¶ he , ©a algate In it went
God ©eue ©ow bothe , oon shames detú to deyen
He swyued the , I saw it w myne eyen
And elles be I hanged , by the hals
And tha~ne is q¶ she , my medycyne fals
For certeynly , if that ©e mygút se
ñe wolde nat seye , theise wordes vn to me
ñe han som glemeryngö , and no ¹fyt sigút
I se q¶ he , as wel as euäe I mygút
Thanked be god , witú bothe myne eyen twoo
And be my trewthe , me thou©t he dide the so
¢ ña mase mase , goode sire q¶ she
This thank haue I , for I made ©ow se
Allas q¶ she , that euäe I was so kynde
Now dame q¶ he , late al passe out of mynde
Come a doun my leef , and if I haue mysseyd
God helpe me so , as I am euele a payd
But be my fadres soule , I wende haue sen
How that this Damyan , had by the leyn
